## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- OS / Device:
- Browser / App Version:
- Environment: Production / Staging / Development

## Logs & Screenshots
Add any relevant logs, stack traces, or screenshots here.

## Additional Context
Any other context that may help diagnose the issue.
